I'll provide: "Here we go: one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight."

Or simply: "1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8."

But to make it actually one sentence with natural flow, I'll write something like: "I can count them off smoothly—one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight."
